summary: Completed testing of Employee and Reports features: Delete employee, Employee roles (Master/Tailor/Worker), Work assignment, Reports status cards with view modals, Per-item reference images in OrderForm. All 13 backend tests passed. All UI elements verified working.
passed_tests: GET /api/employees returns list of employees
POST /api/employees with role=master creates Master employee (weekly pay)
POST /api/employees with role=tailor creates Tailor employee
POST /api/employees with role=worker creates Worker employee
DELETE /api/employees/{id} successfully deletes employee
POST /api/employees/{id}/work assigns work to employee with order linkage
GET /api/reports/orders-by-status?status=pending returns pending orders
GET /api/reports/orders-by-status?status=in_progress returns in-progress orders
GET /api/reports/orders-by-status?status=ready returns ready orders
GET /api/reports/due-soon returns orders due within 2 days
GET /api/reports/financial-summary returns financial data
GET /api/dashboard/stats returns status counts
Employees page: Delete button (trash icon) on each employee card
Employees page: Role badges (Master, Tailor, Worker) displayed
Employees page: Pay, Hours, Assign, Docs buttons on each card
Add Employee modal: Role dropdown with Master (Weekly Pay), Tailor, Worker options
Reports page: NO net summary cards (Total Income/Outgoing/Profit removed)
Reports page: Status cards (Pending Delivery, WIP, Ready, Due Soon) with Eye icons
Reports page: Status cards are clickable and open modal with order details
OrderForm page: Per-item 'Add front neck reference' upload
OrderForm page: Per-item 'Add back neck reference' upload
OrderForm page: Per-item 'Reference Images' section with Upload button
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed employees during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Employee delete with trash icon - DELETE /api/employees/{id} works. 2) Employee roles: master (weekly pay), tailor, worker - all create/display correctly. 3) Work assignment POST /api/employees/{id}/work with order linkage. 4) Reports page: Net summary cards removed, status cards (Pending/WIP/Ready/Due Soon) are clickable with Eye icons, modals show order details. 5) OrderForm: Per-item reference images with front/back neck reference upload buttons. Existing orders: KSH-636, KSH-212, KSH-602, KSH-865, etc.
